books.title: The Sea Mystery
books.author: Freeman Wills Crofts
books.summary: The dogged detective is called in to investigate the grisly contents of a cask dragged up from the bottom of the sea.

books.title: Riders of the Purple Sage
books.author: Zane Grey
books.summary: On a ranch in southern Utah, Jane Withersteen refuses to marry a local church elder, and together with her ranch hand and a mysterious gunman she must face retaliatory violence, theft, and murder.

books.title: Memoirs of a Revolutionist
books.author: Peter Kropotkin
books.summary: A Russian revolutionary tells of his life from early childhood, his adventures as a geographer, and how he turned into an anarcho-communist.

books.title: Eminent Victorians
books.author: Lytton Strachey
books.summary: Four witty and biting biographies of Victorians that take aim at the moral superiority of their subject’s time.

books.title: Bambi
books.author: Felix Salten
books.summary: A roe deer learns the rules of the forest and how to survive in a world inhabited by men as he grows to maturity.

books.title: Man and Superman
books.author: George Bernard Shaw
books.summary: Jack Tanner flees both London and responsibility when he is made guardian of his childhood friend Ann Whitehead.

books.title: The Man of Destiny
books.author: George Bernard Shaw
books.summary: Napoleon engages in a battle of wits to reclaim some stolen letters.

books.title: At the Back of the North Wind
books.author: George MacDonald
books.summary: A young boy’s life is transformed by his visit to the country at the back of the north wind.

books.title: Short Fiction
books.author: Voltairine de Cleyre
books.summary: A collection of all of the short stories written by Voltairine de Cleyre.

books.title: The House on the Borderland
books.author: William Hope Hodgson
books.summary: An account of the terrifying metaphysical haunting of a recluse’s secluded home.

books.title: Scrambles Amongst the Alps in the Years 1860–69
books.author: Edward Whymper
books.summary: A classic in early mountaineering literature, describing the first ascent of the Matterhorn and other climbs in the Alps.

books.title: The Murder on the Links
books.author: Agatha Christie
books.summary: A famous Belgian detective and his sidekick are summoned to France to investigate the mysterious murder of a rich businessman.

books.title: Bashan and I
books.author: Thomas Mann
books.summary: A renowned novelist describes the unique relation that links him to his dog.

books.title: A Vindication of the Rights of Woman
books.author: Mary Wollstonecraft
books.summary: Wollstonecraft argues for equal treatment of women in society, especially in matters of education.

books.title: Poetry
books.author: Oscar Wilde
books.summary: A collection of poems by Oscar Wilde.

books.title: Short Fiction
books.author: Edgar Allan Poe
books.summary: A collection of Edgar Allan Poe’s short fiction, ordered by date of publication.

books.title: Invaders from the Infinite
books.author: John W. Campbell
books.summary: Three scientists join with an alien race to defeat an attacking force.

books.title: Short Fiction
books.author: Tanizaki Jun’ichirō
books.summary: A collection of short fiction by Tanizaki Jun’ichirō, ordered by date of original publication.

books.title: Gitanjali
books.author: Rabindranath Tagore
books.summary: Prose poems of offering translated by the author from the original Bengali.

books.title: Scrambles Amongst the Alps in the Years 1860–69
books.author: Edward Whymper
books.summary: A classic in early mountaineering literature, describing the first ascent of the Matterhorn and other climbs in the Alps.
